description: Scaffold for tying authored game assets to store listings and future collectible/registry opportunities

storeLinkFields.storeSku: Platform SKU or Play/App internal product id (future)
storeLinkFields.registryUri: Optional URI — IPFS, on-chain metadata, or store asset manifest (future)

workflow: Export walkthrough → CREDITS step attributes every sound/texture/model/video
assetRegistry in .threshold-game.json documents rights for store review
store:prep generates credits.md for privacy policy and store forms
Phase M+ — map assetRegistry.items to Steam depot / Play asset packs
